title: Can Botox treatment make you more prone to forehead indentations, e.g. from wearing a hat？
filename: Can Botox treatment make you more prone to forehead indentations, e.g. from wearing a hat？.en.vtt
excerpt: Can having a toxin treatment make you more prone to getting indentation on your forehead from pressure in that area so wearing hats or sweat glands [Music] so i'm trying to think through why this might have come up someone's probably noticed it and thought is this causing it now …

segments.text: can having a toxin treatment make you more prone to getting indentation on your forehead from pressure in that area so wearing hats or sweat glands [Music] so i'm trying to think through why this might have come up someone's probably noticed it and thought is this causing it now i know and most people will know that if you rest on your face maybe because you're sleeping on it sometimes there's an indentation so that's actually normal for all people and no matter whether you've had toxin or not is that any different when you've had toxin it's possible that if the muscle isn't moving so much that firstly you might be able to see that more so you might have a degree of fluid in the skin that would normally be squeezed out by movement and if you've stopped it you have just a little bit more fluid i don't think that's going to be a big feature in the forehead because you're it's the top of your body it's the place easiest to drain but that's one potential cause you sometimes get it around eyes and more in the mid face so potentially it could be an issue there but probably more likely is that the person is now hyper aware of their forehead

because they have had a treatment and they're checking it and similarly they may have no other distractions there at all so this is often the case i think if you smooth out the skin the canvas is clearer you notice other things more obviously so i've had this many times people noticed little freckles that they hadn't noticed before sometimes there's a horizontal crease from sleeping that they haven't noticed before these things will become more obvious and i wouldn't be surprised if this is one of those things where it becomes more obvious the indentation from your hat but actually it was probably there all along so those are my thoughts on it
